title: symphyotrichum turneri
intro: Symphyotrichum turneri, also known as Turner's aster, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Symphyotrichum turneri include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function, among others. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
